---
title: "home"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/grimmjulian
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/grimmjulian225/

---

I help R users ship production-ready code — so your team spends less time debugging and more time on analysis.

<!-- Services Section -->
::: {.services-section}

:::: {.services-grid}

::::: {.service-card}
<div class="service-icon">⚙️</div>
### R Developer Experience
**R** should work for you, not the other way around. I help you make your code production-grade — so you spend less time firefighting and more time doing the work that actually matters.

::: {.service-tags}
[AI tooling]{.tag} [git]{.tag} [testing]{.tag} [CI/CD]{.tag} [auto-reporting]{.tag} [reproducibility]{.tag}
:::
:::::

::::: {.service-card}
<div class="service-icon">📦</div>
### R Package Development
Turn your analysis or toolset into a robust, documented, and tested **R** package — ready for CRAN or internal distribution. Clean APIs, proper OOP design, and full test coverage.

::: {.service-tags}
[CRAN-ready]{.tag} [roxygen2]{.tag} [testthat]{.tag}
:::
:::::

::::: {.service-card}
<div class="service-icon">✨</div>
### Shiny App Development
Build reactive, production-grade Shiny applications your stakeholders will actually want to use. From data explorers to operational dashboards — clean UI, modular structure, and deployment-ready.

::: {.service-tags}
[modules]{.tag} [deployment]{.tag} [bslib]{.tag}
:::
:::::

::::

:::

Ready to reduce friction in your R workflow? [Let's talk on LinkedIn →](https://www.linkedin.com/in/grimmjulian225/)
